content:
# Alkali

**Summary**: Chemicals like Na2CO3 or NaOH used to adjust pH and improve surfactant performance.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] investigated the role of alkalis in creating in-situ surfactants and modifying rock surface charge.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] Alkalis are often used in ASP processes to reduce surfactant adsorption.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] pH adjustment.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Alkalis can modify the formation fluid pH and influence the zeta potential of the rock surface. ([[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022, p. 98]])
